creator: andrew.fengler@scaleengine.com
text:
Created attachment 256605
patch for ports tree

Update to 0.56, and a few patches to support newer 8.10 curl, where a few formatting changes broke some parsing.  There's a bit changed in multi callbacks, seems like curl changed how CURLINFO_PRIVATE works in some cases.

I've tested this with curl 8.11.1 and some use cases for curl multi and it's all looking good now.
